body.title: [awaiting_validation] Add uu_config_dir() resolver; retire fragile parents[N] config-path counting
body.description:
**Problem:** After the single-package collapse, ~25 files locate the in-package config dir by counting `Path(__file__).parents[N] / "config"`. This is fragile: depth depends on the file's location, so a file that moves (or config moving) silently breaks the path — exactly what bit announce/broker.py + igor_shim.py (fixed in 4f0400e5). Some refs are 'correct by coincidence' (moved WITH config) and will break the next time anything moves.
**Proposed shape:** Add a canonical `uu_config_dir()` to unseen_university/_uu_root.py: `return Path(__file__).resolve().parent / "config"` (the module lives at unseen_university/_uu_root.py, so this is always unseen_university/config/, install-location-independent — same pattern as uu_root()/uu_home()). Then migrate the parents[N]/'config' refs to call it (broker, igor_shim, policy/gate, installer/factory, granny/daemon, auditor/device, + the test CANONICAL_PROFILES anchors). For tests, expose via a tiny import or a conftest fixture.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/_uu_root.py (+1 function); ~6 production refs + ~17 test refs that currently parent-count to config.
**Design rules:** one canonical resolver (homogeneity over special-case); install-location-safe (package-anchored, not cwd/repo-root); mirrors uu_root()/uu_home().
**Scope boundary:** IN — add uu_config_dir() + migrate config-dir path-builders to it. OUT — moving config itself; the runtime ~/.unseen_university/profiles fallback (separate concern).
**Test plan:** (1) `python3 -c 'from unseen_university._uu_root import uu_config_dir; assert uu_config_dir().name=="config" and (uu_config_dir()/"profiles"/"base.yaml").exists()'`. (2) `grep -rEn 'parent.*/ .config.' unseen_university/ tests/` returns ~0 (refs now go through uu_config_dir). (3) test_skeleton + announce tests still green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Added uu_config_dir() (package-anchored, depth-independent) to _uu_root.py with a red->green proof (cc.0.uu-config-dir-resolves-to-the-packaged-c..., commit c5782f75: red=AssertionError, green=passed). Migrated all 7 parents[N]/config call-sites to it (commit ff6b14f3); each verified to resolve identically (ALL_MATCH) with zero new failures vs HEAD. Discovered + filed T-reorg-repo-root-paths-broken for the sibling repo-root (devlab) breakage in granny/auditor.
